title: 1st Night: First Flight
overview: A chance encounter with a stranger introduces Ko to a nocturnal life. Ko follows her and why shouldn’t he? The night is still young.

title: 2nd Night: Do You Do LINE?
overview: How can you fall in love with a vampire when you can’t even track them down!? Nazuma remains frustratingly elusive, but Ko may have a nostalgic solution to this new problem.

title: 3rd Night: A Lot Came Out
overview: When can you start calling someone a friend? What even IS friendship, anyway? As Ko reconnects with a classmate, questions arise he isn’t sure he knows how to answer.

title: 4th Night: Isn't This a Tight Squeeze?
overview: Three’s a crowd when Ko invites Akira to hang out with him and Nazuna late one evening.

title: 5h Night: Well, That’s a Problem
overview: How does Nazuna make money, anyway? Ko is about to get the inside scoop on her (very suspicious) business, but first he’ll need to make sense of his complicated emotions.

title: 6th Night: Might as Well Have Fun
overview: Ko doesn’t need a mirror to see his reflection. It’s staring right back at him in the form of Nazuna’s latest client.

title: 7th Night: Reproduce
overview: Boredom drove Ko into the night. Boredom drove Ko’s new acquaintance to killing time in her own way. She and Ko seem very similar… perhaps TOO similar for comfort.

title: 8th Night: All of Us
overview: Ko thought he had all the time in the world, but the revelation of an unexpected deadline changes everything. Hopefully his friends (new and old alike) will have some advice.

title: 9th Night: No Fair
overview: Seri is extremely popular, but popularity isn’t all it’s cracked up to be when one of her human paramours develops feelings she isn’t ready to deal with.

title: 10th Night: Enlarge the Peeping-Tom Photos
overview: It’s not all sparkles and hearts at the maid café where Midori works. Someone is creeping on a certain maid, but uncovering the interloper isn’t as easy as it looks…

title: 11th Night: Do You Know What a Vampire Is?
overview: Nazuna needs new blood for her cuddle-buddy business, and Ko is on the case! But he’s not the only one wandering the night looking for someone…

title: 12th Night: My Mom’s Out Tonight
overview: What does it mean to be a vampire? Why does Ko want to become one? A chat with a friend reveals Ko’s lack of answers to these all-important questions.

title: 13th Night: Call of the Night
overview: The night feels distant. Ko isn’t sure how to close that gap.

title: 1st Night: That time's not for us.
overview: A new night begins as the other vampires offer to help Ko and Nazuna with their relationship. But what they really want, however, are the deets.

title: 2nd Night: I've been looking for you.
overview: Ko's alarm bells go off when he meets Mahiru's new friend. Mahiru may not know what Kiku is, but Ko does.

title: 3rd Night: There aren't any ghosts in a haunted house.
overview: A tense confrontation with Anko reveals an alarming secret: vampires have a weakness they didn't know about. Now, they all must decide their next move.

title: 4th Night: Do you want to be able to run?
overview: Some patients say Room 307 is haunted, and Kabura warns Ko and Nazuna to stay away. Something's in that forbidden room. Something that might hold the key to the past.

title: 5th Night: The few years I spent with you...
overview: Kabura thought she'd be with Haru forever. But life never goes according to plan, even for vampires. Now Kabura is left with a burden she never asked for.

title: 6th Night: I'm not asking about the quality.
overview: With Anko closing in, the vampires must destroy the source of their weakness before she can find them. Midori's search leads Ko and Nazuna to someone... unexpected.

title: 7th Night: You're too stupid for that.
overview: When Ko finds the diary of a girl called Kyoko, he discovers that he wasn't Nazuna's first human friend. Nor the first person she ever considered turning...

title: 8th Night: You're the first, Senpai.
overview: What began as Kyoko and Nazuna's investigation into a supposed affair led to a life-changing event that altered their relationship forever.

title: 9th Night: Yamori-kun, what do you want to do?
overview: Vampires cannot be harmed by conventional means, so what does Anko hope to accomplish by shooting them out in the open? Ko suspects there’s a method to her madness.

title: 10th Night: I wanted it to be you.
overview: As the battle between vampire and hunter erupts, Ko finally realizes the full scope of what's at stake. Now he must stop both Anko and Nazuna before it's too late.

title: 11th Night: Mwah...
overview: Something's wrong. Or maybe too right. Ko isn't a vampire, so why does it feel like his body's ignoring the rules? He and Nazuna need answers.

title: 12th Night: Call of the Night
overview: Growing up doesn't guarantee answers to life. As Ko wonders what it means to be ordinary, he and Nazuna venture through the city. Where will the night take them this time?
